<{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack::test]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:providers:pkgA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::default]

<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::a]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::b]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::c]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::target]

    <{%fg 2%}>+ 5 created<{%reset%}>
